zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Beaufitz於1427年出生在英國肯特斯可也斯 霍爾時，她的父親William Beaufitz28歲，母親Elizabeth Denton20歲。她於1433年與William John Scott結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1487年3月25日在英國肯特布拉布恩享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特布拉布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Beaufitz于1427年出生在英国肯特斯可也斯 霍爾时，她的父亲William Beaufitz28岁，母亲Elizabeth Denton20岁。她于1433年与William John Scott结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1487年3月25日在英国肯特布拉布恩享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特布拉布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Beaufitz was born in 1427, in Scot's Hall, Kent, England, her father, William Beaufitz, was 28 and her mother, Elizabeth Denton, was 20. She married William John Scott in 1433. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 25 March 1487, in Brabourne, Kent, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Brabourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Beaufitz est née en 1427, à Scot's Hall, Kent, Angleterre, son père, William Beaufitz, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Denton, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé William John Scott en 1433. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 mars 1487, à Brabourne, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Brabourne, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Beaufitz 1427 in Scot's Hall, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Beaufitz 28 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Denton 20. Sie hat 1433 William John Scott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. März 1487 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Brabourne, Kent, England und wurde in Brabourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Beaufitz è nata il nel 1427 nel Scot's Hall, Kent, England, sua padre, William Beaufitz, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Denton, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato William John Scott nel 1433. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 25 marzo 1487, nel Brabourne, Kent, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Brabourne, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Beaufitzが1427年にイギリスケントスコト'ス ハルで生まれた時，父William Beaufitzは28歳，母Elizabeth Dentonは20歳であった。1433年にWilliam John Scottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1487年3月25日にイギリスケントブラボウルンで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントブラボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Beaufitz(이)가 1427년 영국 켄트 스컷'스 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Beaufitz(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Denton(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1433년 William John Scott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1487년 3월 25일 영국 켄트 브라보우른에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 브라보우른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Beaufitz nasceu em 1427, em Scot's Hall, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Beaufitz, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Denton, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com William John Scott em 1433. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de março de 1487, em Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Beaufitz родилась в 1427 г. в местности скот'с холл, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени William Beaufitz было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Denton, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William John Scott в 1433 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 25 марта 1487 г. в местности брабурн, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности брабурн, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Beaufitz nació en 1427, en Scot's Hall, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, William Beaufitz, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Denton, tenía 20 años. Se casó con William John Scott en 1433. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 25 de marzo de 1487, en Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
